name: laptime-insights-landing
description: Standalone marketing landing page for laptimeinsights.com (static, Cloudflare Pages).

scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:css && pnpm run copy
scripts.preview: pnpm run build && npx --yes serve dist
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=laptime-insights --branch=main
scripts.deploy:preview: pnpm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=laptime-insights --branch=preview
